title.en: Therefore, Ye Tian didn't need to worry about t...

content.en:
Ye Tian was also extremely looking forward to the Yuan Gu Palace, after all, there was an opportunity that was more precious than the ruin world, and it was an opportunity that was completely aimed at improving his personal strength.

In the Ruins World, Ye Tian relied on several major opportunities, and now he could easily have the combat power of His Royal Highness the Supreme Level, if he gained something in the Yuan Gu Palace, his strength would definitely be greatly improved, and he might not need to worry about the Thunder Tribulation in the future.

The higher the cultivation, the more terrifying the thunder tribulation will be, if you don't have enough strength and potential, you won't be able to transcend the universe at all, and you will even fall under the thunder tribulation on the road before the supreme level.

Therefore, Ye Tian must continue to improve his strength and raise his strength to an extremely high level as much as possible, so that he can be sure enough to survive the thunder tribulations again and again, and become an existence above the supreme level or even beyond the supreme.

There are still ten years left before the opening of the Yuan Gu Palace, which is not a short time, Ye Tian can use the remaining ten years to improve his strength.

As for the matter of snatching the Yuangu Order, Ye Tian couldn't help much, it was a matter of trouble for the high-level of the human race.

Anyway, the Supreme Kunwu said that no matter how much the Terran snatched the Yuangu Order, he must have a Yuangu Order, which is also the cultivation and reward of the Terran for him.

If even he doesn't have the Yuan Gu Order, then the others are even less qualified.

Therefore, Ye Tian didn't need to worry about the Yuan Gu Ling.

In the following days, the universe was very unpeaceful, and the big clans of the universe and even some small clans were also fighting for the Yuangu Order, and each Yuangu Order caused a bloody storm, and even many races were annihilated in this Yuangu Order.

At this time, the Terrans inevitably infiltrated some alien powerhouses.

Due to the fact that the territory of the human race is not small, it is impossible to defend against all the alien powerhouses in time, some of the alien powerhouses were killed by the human high-level, and some escaped by luck.

With the passage of time, the plan of the human race to transform the immortal race was inevitably exposed.

For a moment, many of the cosmic clans were shocked.

Many cosmic clans are not unfamiliar with the name of the Immortal Race, because some inheritances in the Ruins World have mentioned the Immortal Clan, which was one of the top races in the last cosmic era.

Unexpectedly, this universe also gave birth to the immortal race, and it was a human race with low individual potential.

Protoss.

A splendid hall.

The first god of the Protoss sat on a high throne, and the other gods sat in turn.

The nine gods of the god lord are the nine strongest beings among the supreme, and unlike the god lord of the human race, the god lord of the human race and the god lord of many races are often the title of the god of the universe, and they are called so-and-so god lords.

And among the Protoss, because of the Nine Great Gods, the other cosmic gods cannot take the name of the God Lord, but call them God Generals!

The powerhouses of the Divine Race who dominate the realm are called God Kings, while the powerhouses who are beyond the Domination Realm are called God Emperors, ordinary Supremes are called Divine Lords, and the nine most powerful Supremes are Divine Lords!

At this time, six of the Nine Great Divine Masters were gathering and discussing a matter.

Below, a Juggernaut-level god is reporting.

"The six Divine Lords, I just confirmed that the human race is transforming into an immortal race, and many human races have become immortal races, and their strength has increased greatly, and a large number of god-level powerhouses have been born!"

This god will report truthfully.

The First Divine Lord pondered for a while and said, "Human, I didn't expect that this small universe clan, among the universe clans, would send the top hundred at most, but it would embark on the path of the immortal clan, it would be a threat!"

The Third Divine Lord spoke: "First Divine Master, do we Protoss want to attack the Terrans, and wipe out the Terrans while the Terrans have not completely risen!"

"No!" the first god lord shook his head, "The human race has some background, if the human race is forcibly erased, our god race will also pay some price, although the price is not big, but I am afraid that the demon race will take the opportunity to attack our god race, then the price of our god race will be too great! "

"In case the human race rises completely, it will also be a threat to our god race!"

The Sixth Divine Lord spoke.

"Don't worry, the strength of our Protoss is beyond the imagination of the Terrans, even if the Terrans become immortals, there is no way to compete with our Protoss. After the matter of the Yuangu Palace, let's take some measures against the human race!" the First Divine Lord ordered.

"Yes!"

The other gods answered.

Conversations like this take place in many cosmic families.

However, many of the great races of the universe that are hostile to the Terrans are a little afraid of the strength of the Terrans and dare not really make a move against the Terrans, so they are all watching and secretly looking for opportunities.

If they seize the opportunity, they will definitely attack the Terrans, even if they can't destroy the Terrans, they will bring huge damage to the Terrans.

In the blink of an eye, ten years have passed in a flash.

In the past ten years, Ye Tian has been practicing seriously, although his cultivation is still at the ninth order of the god level, he has compressed the immortal power by eleven times, and he has also perfected the Tianyue Sword Peerless Technique a little, and he is not far from truly creating his own origin of the law of the sword.

In addition, Ye Tian's Mixed Yuan Scale Armor, Mixed Yuan Vine, Chaos Palm and many other divine secret techniques have also been perfected one by one, increasing their power a lot.

In short, Ye Tian's strength is stronger now than it was at the beginning.

It's just that at Ye Tian's level, it's too difficult to greatly improve his strength, and it would be very good to be able to improve it a little.

......

"Your Highness, the Kunwu Supreme has summoned you!"

Ye Tian's Guardian Dark Lord appeared in front of Ye Tian and said.

"Take me there!"

Ye Tian nodded.

He knew that the day had come to go to the Yuangu Palace!

Soon, Ye Tian came to the Kunwu Hall and saw the Kunwu Supreme.

When the Kunwu Supreme saw that Ye Tian was coming, he took out a quaint silver token.

From this silver token, Ye Tian felt the breath of eternity, supreme power, and unimaginable mystery.

"Ye Tian, this token is the Yuangu Order. The Yuangu Hall is located at a special latitude, beyond time and space, even if it is the Supreme, only when the Yuangu Palace is opened, can the location of the Yuangu Hall be slightly sensed, but it is difficult to enter the Yuangu Order, and it must also be with the help of the Yuangu Order. You take this Yuangu Order, refine it, activate the Yuangu Order, and you can enter the spatial latitude where the Yuangu Hall is located!" Kunwu Supreme introduced.

"Thank you Kungo Supreme!"

Ye Tian took the Yuangu Order with both hands and retreated.

Next, Ye Tian went back to refine the Yuan Gu Ling.

Although the Yuan Gu Ling was very mysterious and not a low-level item, it was very easy to refine, and it didn't take long for Ye Tian to successfully refine the Yuan Gu Ling.

At this time, Ye Tian really sensed the specific day of the opening of the Yuangu Palace through the Yuangu Order.

"Eight days to go!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Eight days is not a long time, eight days have passed in the blink of an eye.

this day.

The breath of the Yuangu Hall spread to all parts of the universe, and the Yuangu Hall was truly opened.

At the first time, many powerhouses activated the Yuangu Order, and Ye Tian was also one of them.
